holdings.infoBox: GRPZ is an equity ETF with a total of 89 individual holdings. The top holdings are Powell Industries stock at 3.67%, International Seaways at 2.61%, TG Therapeutics at 2.48%, Catalyst Pharmaceuticals at 2.18%, and Krystal Biotech at 2.09%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap 600 GARP ETF (GRPZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P SmallCap 600 GARP index. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap growth stocks that exhibit quality and value characteristics. GRPZ was launched on Mar 27, 2024 and is issued by Invesco.
